CustomField.description: When non-null, the Checkout Cart surfaces dollar amounts ($ per line + totals) in addition to hours, provided a single blended rate is resolvable. Null = hours-only (default; MF behavior). Self-serve orgs opt in.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set to show dollars in the Checkout Cart (requires a single resolvable blended rate). Leave blank for hours-only.
CustomField.label: Enable Cart Dollars
